---
applyTo: "**/*.cpp,**/*.hpp,**/*.py"
---
# Copyright

## C++ (`.cpp`, `.hpp`)

Start with a Doxygen file block:

- `@file`, `@brief`, `@author Kosy Development Team`
- `@copyright Copyright (c) YYYY Kosy Development Team`
- `@license MIT`

## Python (`.py`)

First line:

```
# Copyright (c) YYYY Kosy Development Team. All rights reserved.
```

Use the current year for new files.
